name: Barbeque-Spiced Grilled Tenderloin Steaks
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the first six ingredients.
This mixture can be prepared up to one week in advance and stored in an airtight container.
2. Prepare your barbecue on high heat.
Generously rub the spice mixture onto both sides of the steaks.
3. Grill the steaks until they reach your desired level of doneness, about 3 minutes per side for medium-rare.
4. Serve the steaks hot.
